changelog: Fixed: Drag and drop no longer jumps to first position when dragging the last exercise — DndContext moved outside scroll container so collision coordinates match correctly.
Fixed: Drag overlay now visible during drag — switched to high-contrast accent background so it doesn't blend into the dark theme.
Fixed: Videos now play offline after download — race condition resolved between video error and filesystem cache lookup.
New: Download button checks internet connection before downloading — shows Internet required toast when offline.
New: Smart download with change detection — routine already downloaded and unchanged skips re-download, shows success immediately.
New: Share workout expanded to 5 themes — Midnight Blue, Royal Purple, Emerald added to Classic Dark and Dark Crimson.
Fixed: ExerciseModal correctly shows the exercise video when offline — image was shown instead.
